files.name: _shared/logger.ts
files.content: export function generateRequestId(){return`req_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2,9)}`}export function createLogEntry(r,t,e,n){return{timestamp:new Date().toISOString(),level:r,event:t,request_id:e.request_id,generation_id:e.generation_id,...n}}export class Logger{context;logs=[];constructor(t,e){this.context={function_name:t,request_id:e||generateRequestId()}}setGenerationId(t){this.context.generation_id=t}getRequestId(){return this.context.request_id}getLogs(){return this.logs}log(t,e,n){const o=createLogEntry(t,e,this.context,n);return this.logs.push(o),(t==="error"?console.error:t==="warn"?console.warn:t==="debug"?console.debug:console.info)(JSON.stringify(o)),o}debug(t,e){return this.log("debug",t,e)}info(t,e){return this.log("info",t,e)}warn(t,e){return this.log("warn",t,e)}error(t,e,n){const o=e instanceof Error?{message:e.message,stack:e.stack}:{message:e};return this.log("error",t,{...n,error:o})}}export const DEFAULT_RETRY_CONFIG={maxRetries:3,initialDelayMs:5e3,maxDelayMs:6e4,backoffMultiplier:2};export async function withRetry(r,t,e={}){const{maxRetries:n,initialDelayMs:o,maxDelayMs:m,backoffMultiplier:l}={...DEFAULT_RETRY_CONFIG,...e};let a=null,g=o;for(let i=1;i<=n+1;i++)try{t.info("retry.attempt",{retry_attempt:i,metadata:{max_retries:n}});const s=Date.now(),u=await r(),p=Date.now()-s;return t.info("retry.success",{retry_attempt:i,duration_ms:p}),{result:u,attempts:i}}catch(s){a=s instanceof Error?s:new Error(String(s)),t.warn("retry.failed",{retry_attempt:i,error:{message:a.message},metadata:{will_retry:i<=n,next_delay_ms:g}}),i<=n&&(await new Promise(u=>setTimeout(u,g)),g=Math.min(g*l,m))}return t.error("retry.exhausted",a,{metadata:{total_attempts:n+1}}),{error:a,attempts:n+1}}export function extractOutputUrl(r){if(r.output&&Array.isArray(r.output)&&r.output.length>0){const t=r.output[0];if(typeof t=="string"&&t.startsWith("http"))return t}return r.output&&typeof r.output=="string"&&r.output.startsWith("http")?r.output:r.future_links&&Array.isArray(r.future_links)&&r.future_links.length>0?r.future_links[0]:null}

function o(){return Deno.env.get("ADMIN_DEVICE_ID")||null}async function u(i){const{data:n}=await i.from("system_config").select("value").eq("key","subscription_check_enabled").maybeSingle();return n?n.value===!0||n.value==="true":!0}async function c(i,n,t){const r=new Date(Date.now()-t*24*60*60*1e3),{count:a}=await i.from("generations").select("*",{count:"exact",head:!0}).eq("device_id",n).gte("created_at",r.toISOString());return a||0}async function l(i,n,t,r,a){if(a===null)return{valid:!0,planId:t,generationLimit:r,periodDays:null,generationsRemaining:-1};const e=await c(i,n,a),s=Math.max(0,r-e);return s<=0?{valid:!1,planId:t,generationLimit:r,periodDays:a,generationsUsed:e,generationsRemaining:0,error:`Generation limit reached for plan ${t}. Used ${e}/${r} in the last ${a} days.`,errorCode:"LIMIT_REACHED"}:{valid:!0,planId:t,generationLimit:r,periodDays:a,generationsUsed:e,generationsRemaining:s}}export async function checkDeviceSubscription(i,n,t){const r=o();if(r&&t===r)return{valid:!0,planId:"admin_override"};if(!await u(i))return{valid:!0,planId:"check_disabled"};const{data:e}=await i.from("device_subscriptions").select(`
      plan_id,
      expires_at,
      subscription_plans (
        generation_limit,
        period_days
      )
    `).eq("device_id",n).maybeSingle();if(!e)return{valid:!1,error:"No active subscription found. Please subscribe to generate videos.",errorCode:"NO_SUBSCRIPTION"};if(e.expires_at&&new Date(e.expires_at)<new Date)return{valid:!1,error:"Your subscription has expired. Please renew to continue generating videos.",errorCode:"SUBSCRIPTION_EXPIRED"};const s=e.subscription_plans;return s?await l(i,n,e.plan_id,s.generation_limit,s.period_days):{valid:!0,planId:e.plan_id}}

files.name: _shared/providers/grok-text.ts
files.content: export async function executeGrokText(t,r){const n=Deno.env.get("GROK_API_KEY");if(!n)throw new Error("GROK_API_KEY not configured");const a=t.model||"grok-3-mini-fast";r.info("grok.text.start",{metadata:{model:a,prompt_length:t.prompt.length}});const s={model:a,messages:[{role:"user",content:t.prompt}],max_tokens:t.maxTokens||1e3,temperature:t.temperature??.7},e=await fetch("https://api.x.ai/v1/chat/completions",{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json",Authorization:`Bearer ${n}`},body:JSON.stringify(s)});if(!e.ok){const i=await e.text();throw new Error(`Grok Text API ${e.status}: ${i}`)}const o=(await e.json()).choices?.[0]?.message?.content?.trim();if(!o)throw new Error("Grok Text returned no content");return r.info("grok.text.completed",{metadata:{output_length:o.length}}),{text:o}}

files.name: _shared/providers/grok-video.ts
files.content: import{withRetry as u}from"../logger.ts";export async function executeGrokVideo(r,o){const n=Deno.env.get("GROK_API_KEY");if(!n)throw new Error("GROK_API_KEY not configured");const s=r.model||"grok-imagine-video";o.info("grok.video.start",{metadata:{model:s,duration:r.duration,aspect_ratio:r.aspectRatio,resolution:r.resolution}});const a={model:s,prompt:r.prompt,image:{url:r.imageUrl},duration:r.duration||10,aspect_ratio:r.aspectRatio||"9:16",resolution:r.resolution||"720p"},i=await u(async()=>{const e=await fetch("https://api.x.ai/v1/videos/generations",{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json",Authorization:`Bearer ${n}`},body:JSON.stringify(a)});if(!e.ok){const d=await e.text();throw new Error(`Grok Video API ${e.status}: ${d}`)}return e.json()},o,{maxRetries:1});if("error"in i)throw i.error;const t=i.result;if(!t||!t.request_id){const e=t?.error?.message||"Grok did not return a request_id";throw new Error(e)}return o.info("grok.video.queued",{metadata:{request_id:t.request_id}}),{requestId:t.request_id}}
